mapper.select: select t1.code,t2.icon_url,t2.bank_name,t1.id from app_b_user_bank t1 left join app_wx_bank t2 on t1.bank_id=t2.id where t1.user_id=#{id} and t1.status=1

SELECT a.id,bank_id bankId,user_id userId,code,b.bank_name bankName,bank_user_name bankUserName,b.icon_url bankImg FROM app_b_user_bank as a LEFT JOIN app_wx_bank as b ON a.bank_id = b.id WHERE user_id = #{userBId} and status = 1
